name: Pomegranate
description: Seeds quicken the blood; likely a vitality/power item.

name: Gray-Grow-Young Plant
description: Plant said to cure wounds and make a person younger again.

name: Throwing Axe Driver
description: Well-crafted throwing axe empowered by Sir Adroit and Cunning.

name: Animal Bone
description: Medicine woman asks for an animal bone.

name: Image of Great Mother
description: Created by the medicine woman in exchange for a bone.

name: Holy Emblems of the Three Great Shapes
description: Profane keys of passage through a trio of gates.

name: Sealed Thing in Darkness with Fire About It
description: Osiris-linked rejuvenating essence at the end of the quest.

name: Ka
description: Egyptian spiritual self referenced in afterworld travel.

name: Sekhu
description: Remains/body-spirit term in the Sethos tomb prayer.

name: Boat Propulsion
description: Urshanabi says to take all you can to propel the boat across deadly water.
